amendments.text: [The unusable fuel supply for each tank must be established as not less than that quantity at which the first evidence of malfunctioning occurs under the most adverse fuel feed condition occurring under each intended operation and flight maneuver involving that tank.] 67-14; Issued on 04/05/67. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 67-14; Issued on 04/05/67. 8083; Issued on 08/01/69. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 8083; Issued on 08/01/69.
